---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, scanning tool integration, or compliance framework
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like em-dash to do?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Which skill does this affect?**
- [ ] `/hipaa` (router)
- [ ] `/hipaa-assess` (organizational assessment)
- [ ] `/hipaa-scan` (automated scanning)
- [ ] `/hipaa-remediate` (fix findings)
- [ ] `/hipaa-report` (compliance reports)
- [ ] `/hipaa-monitor` (drift detection)
- [ ] `/hipaa-breach` (breach notification)
- [ ] New skill / general improvement

**Which compliance framework?**
- [ ] HIPAA (current)
- [ ] SOC 2 (planned)
- [ ] HITRUST (planned)
- [ ] ISO 27001 (planned)
- [ ] Other: ___

**Which HIPAA requirement does this relate to?**
e.g., §164.312(a)(1) Access Control, or N/A if it's a general improvement.

**Are you willing to contribute this?**
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] No, just suggesting
